blocks.name: Squat Snatch
blocks.content:
EMOMx 8 sets:
Set 1 à 4: 2 Squat Snatch @70-73% of your 1RM 129.5lb to 135lb
Set 5 à 8: 1 Squat Snatch @75-83% of your 1RM 139lb to 153.5lb

blocks.name: Overhead Squat
blocks.content:
Every 1min30 x 4 sets of:
3 Overhead Squat from Ground (Clean and Jerk Start)
Build to a moderately heavy 3 reps OHS for the day (RPE 8 - plus lourd que la semaine dernière)
Objectif: On descend à 3 reps (vs 4 la semaine passée), on veut monter en charge.
Départ en C&J obligatoire. Amplitude complète, genou vers l'extérieur, regard devant.
DÉPART EN CLEAN AND JERK OBLIGATOIRE AMPLITUDE COMPLÈTE!

blocks.name: Gymnastic Ring Muscle-up
blocks.content:
RX:
Every 2min x 4 sets:
10/7 Cal Echo Bike @85%+
Max Ring Muscle-up Unbroken (stop 1-2 reps before failure)
Score: total RMU sur 5 sets
Objectif: Format Associé, le bike crée une fatigue systémique (cardio + jambes) avant chaque set de RMU.
L'objectif n'est pas la performance maximale sur le bike, c'est d'arriver aux RMU dans un état de fatigue contrôlée.
Stop avant l'échec!
INTER+:
Every 2min x 4 sets:
10/7 Cal Echo Bike @85%+
Max Ring Muscle-up Unbroken (stop avant l'échec)

INTER:
High amplitude ring swing focus x40 reps
Kipping hip extension x12 reps
Bascule feet on the floor x12 reps
+ 20-24 Ring muscle-up / Spotted ring muscle-up
Technique parfaite - 0 Échec!

blocks.name: ITW Gymnastic X Odd objectif
blocks.content:
Rx -
2 Rounds for time:
25 Dumbbell snatch #22,5/15
25 Chest to bar pull-up
25 Box jump over
Time CAP: 10:00
INTER+ -
2 Rounds for time:
25 Dumbbell snatch #22,5/15
18 Chest to bar pull-up
25 Box jump over
Time CAP: 10:00
INTER -
4 Rounds for time:
25 Dumbbell snatch #22,5/15
18 pull-up
25 Box jump over
Time CAP: 10:00
